intro: Stachygynandrum japonicum, also known as Japanese spiny club moss or Stachygynandrum, is a species of vascular plant in the family Lycopodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat a range of conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
